q: The CEO's [[decision|決定]] to [[downsize|裁員]] the company was met with heavy [[criticism|批評]].
e: 周可可：criticism 是批評，與 Condemnation (譴責) 意思最接近。✅

q: The [[ancient|古老的]] ruins were so [[fragile|脆弱的]] that tourists were forbidden to touch them.
e: 周可可：fragile 是易碎、脆弱的，等於 Delicate 喔！❌

q: After the long [[drought|乾旱]], the farmers were [[desperate|絕望的]] for rain.
e: 周可可：desperate 在此語境指『極度渴望/急切的』，接近 Eager。✅

q: The lawyer's [[argument|論點]] was so [[compelling|有說服力的]] that the jury reached a verdict quickly.
e: 周可可：compelling 指令人信服的，就是 Persuasive。✅

q: His [[obsession|執著]] with [[perfection|完美]] often leads to unnecessary [[procrastination|拖延]].
e: 周可可：obsession 是癡迷、執著，等於 Fixation。❓

q: Find the error: Neither [A] the teacher [B] nor [C] the student [D] are responsible.
e: 周可可：Neither...nor 遵循就近原則，student 是單數，應改為 is！❌

q: Find the error: She [A] has [B] been [C] living [D] here since ten years.
e: 周可可：since 要接時間點，這裏是段時間，應改為 for ten years！✅

q: Find the error: The news [A] that [B] he died [C] were [D] a great shock.
e: 周可可：News 是不可數名詞，動詞要用單數 was 喔！❓

q: Find the error: I [A] look [B] forward [C] to [D] meet you.
e: 周可可：look forward to 的 to 是介系詞，後面要接 meeting！❌

q: Find the error: He [A] is [B] enough [C] tall [D] to play basketball.
e: 周可可：enough 修飾形容詞要放後面，應為 tall enough！✅

q: ________ for your help, I would have [[failed|失敗]] the exam.
e: 周可可：對過去事實虛擬的倒裝句型：Had it not been for... ✅

q: The more you [[learn|學習]], ________ you realize how little you know.
e: 周可可：The more... the more... 越...就越...。❓

q: Hardly ________ the house when it started to [[pour|下大雨]].
e: 周可可：Hardly 放在句首要倒裝，用過去完成式。✅

q: I suggest that he ________ to the [[dentist|牙醫]] immediately.
e: 周可可：suggest 引導的從句省略了 should，用原型動詞 go。❌

q: It is high time we ________ something about [[pollution|污染]].
e: 周可可：It is high time 後接從句固定用過去式 did！✅

article:
Article: "The Paradox of Choice" by Will Floyd
In the modern era, [[abundance|豐富]] is often equated with [[freedom|自由]]. However, Will Floyd argues that an [[excess|過量]] of options can lead to [[paralysis|癱瘓]] rather than liberation. When faced with too many paths, the human brain tends to [[retreat|撤退]] into indecision, ultimately decreasing overall [[satisfaction|滿意度]]. Floyd's research into consumer behavior suggests that limiting choices can actually enhance the quality of life.
q: What is the primary [[argument|論點]] of Will Floyd's article?
o: More choices lead to more freedom
Limiting choices can improve life quality
e: 周可可：文中提到 limiting choices (限制選擇) 能提升生活品質喔！✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Paradox of Choice) The brain's reaction to excess options is described as ________.
q: According to the text, what happens when there are too many options?
e: 周可可：文中提到會 lead to paralysis (癱瘓) 和 indecision (優柔寡斷)。❌

article: (Refer to Floyd's Paradox of Choice) Floyd's study focuses mainly on ________.
q: What is the specific field of Floyd's research mentioned?
e: 周可可：文中說這是對 consumer behavior (消費者行為) 的研究。✅

q: The [[evidence|證據]] was [[circumstantial|間接的]], but it was enough to [[convict|定罪]] him.
e: 周可可：circumstantial 指依據情況推測的，即 Indirect (間接的)。❓

q: Her [[contribution|貢獻]] to the field of [[physics|物理]] was [[significant|重大的]].
e: 周可可：significant 是指重要的、相當大的，等於 Considerable。✅

q: Find the error: The [A] number of [B] students [C] are [D] increasing.
e: 周可可：'The number of...' 做主語動詞用單數 is！❌

q: Find the error: He [A] said [B] that [C] he [D] will come tomorrow.
e: 周可可：主句是過去式 said，從句也要用過去式 would！✅

q: Find the error: [A] Despite [B] he was [C] tired, he [D] worked late.
e: 周可可：Despite 是介系詞，後面不能直接接子句，應改為 Although。❓

q: Find the error: One [A] of my [B] friend [C] is [D] coming.
e: 周可可：One of 後面要接複數名詞 friends 喔！❌

q: Find the error: She [A] sings [B] more [C] better [D] than me.
e: 周可可：better 本身就是比較級，不加 more！✅

q: Not until yesterday ________ the truth about the [[incident|事件]].
e: 周可可：Not until 放在句首，主句要倒裝：did I know。✅

q: If I ________ you, I would take that [[opportunity|機會]].
e: 周可可：與現在事實相反的虛擬語氣，be 動詞一律用 were。❌

q: He is said ________ in the [[Amazon|亞馬遜]] for five years.
e: 周可可：表示『據說已經...』，用不定詞的完成式 to have lived。✅

q: So ________ was the test that no one passed it.
e: 周可可：So + 形容詞放在句首倒裝。✅

q: I'd rather you ________ [[noisy|吵鬧的]] in the library.
e: 周可可：would rather + 從句表示願望用過去式 weren't。❓

article:
Article: "The Echoes of Ancient Greece" by Will Floyd
The [[influence|影響]] of Hellenistic art on Western [[sculpture|雕塑]] is [[undeniable|不可否認的]]. Will Floyd points out that the [[emphasis|強調]] on muscular [[anatomy|解剖學]] and emotional [[expression|表達]] created a new [[standard|標準]] for beauty. Unlike earlier rigid forms, Greek statues captured [[fluidity|流動性]] and movement. Floyd's analysis reveals that this shift was not merely [[technical|技術性的]] but also [[philosophical|哲學上的]], reflecting a deeper interest in the human condition.
q: According to Will Floyd, the shift in Greek art reflected ________.
o: A deeper interest in the human condition
e: 周可可：文中最後一句說反映了對人類處境 (human condition) 的興趣喔！✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Ancient Greece) What was the main difference between Greek statues and earlier forms?
q: Greek statues were different because they ________.
e: 周可可：文中提到 Greek statues captured fluidity and movement。❌

article: (Refer to Floyd's Ancient Greece) The word 'undeniable' in the first sentence means ________.
q: Choose the best synonym for 'undeniable'.
e: 周可可：undeniable 是不可否認的，就是 Certain (確定的)。✅

article:
Article: "The AI Frontier" by Will Floyd
Will Floyd's latest [[exploration|探索]] into [[robotics|機器人學]] suggests that the [[boundary|邊界]] between humans and machines is [[blurring|變得模糊]]. As [[algorithms|演算法]] become more [[sophisticated|複雜的]], they can simulate [[creativity|創造力]] and even [[empathy|同理心]]. Critics worry about [[job displacement|失業]], but Floyd remains [[optimistic|樂觀的]], believing that AI will [[augment|增強]] human potential rather than replace it.
q: Will Floyd's view on AI can be best described as ________.
e: 周可可：文中明說 Floyd remains optimistic (保持樂觀) 喔！✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's AI Frontier) According to Floyd, AI will ________.
q: What will AI do to human potential according to the text?
e: 周可可：文中說 AI will augment (增強) human potential。❌

q: The [[pervasive|普遍的]] smell of [[damp|潮濕]] indicated that the house had been empty for years.
e: 周可可：pervasive 是指無處不在、遍布的，即 Widespread。✅

q: The committee reached a [[unanimous|一致的]] decision to [[approve|批准]] the budget.
e: 周可可：unanimous 指全體一致的 (Shared by all)。✅

q: She is a [[diligent|勤奮的]] student who never misses a [[deadline|截稿日]].
e: 周可可：diligent 就是勤奮刻苦，等於 Hard-working。✅

q: The [[hostile|敵對的]] environment made it difficult for the plants to [[thrive|茁壯成長]].
e: 周可可：hostile 是敵對、不利的，即 Unfriendly。❌

q: The [[abrupt|突然的]] change in weather caught us [[off guard|措手不及]].
e: 周可可：abrupt 是突然的，等於 Sudden。✅

q: Find the error: Every [A] students [B] must [C] bring [D] their books.
e: 周可可：Every 後面要接單數名詞 student 喔！❌

q: Find the error: The [A] food [B] tastes [C] very [D] badly.
e: 周可可：taste 是連綴動詞，後面接形容詞 bad 而不是副詞 badly！✅

q: Find the error: He [A] is [B] looking forward [C] to [D] go home.
e: 周可可：又是 look forward to + V-ing (going) 喔！❌

q: Find the error: [A] If I [B] am you, I [C] would [D] help him.
e: 周可可：虛擬語氣 be 動詞用 were！✅

q: Find the error: She [A] is [B] the [C] more [D] beautiful girl in class.
e: 周可可：在全班範圍要用最高級 the most beautiful。❓

q: Scarcely ________ when the [[explosion|爆炸]] occurred.
e: 周可可：Scarcely 句首倒裝型。✅

q: It is essential that every member ________ at the [[meeting|會議]].
e: 周可可：essential + (should) be。❌

q: The cake, ________ by my mother, was [[delicious|美味的]].
e: 周可可：蛋糕是被做的，用過去分詞 made。✅

q: Only in this way ________ solve the [[problem|問題]].
e: 周可可：Only + 介系詞片語在句首，主句部分倒裝。✅

q: I'd rather you ________ me the truth about the [[incident|事件]] yesterday.
e: 周可可：would rather 對『過去』的願望，用 had + p.p. 喔！❌

q: The [[ancient|古老的]] manuscript was so [[fragile|脆弱的]] that it required careful handling.
e: 周可可：fragile 是指易碎、脆弱的，所以是 Delicate 喔！✅

q: She was [[overwhelmed|招架不住]] by the [[complexity|複雜性]] of the task.
e: 周可可：overwhelmed 在這裡指被繁重的任務壓得喘不過氣。❓

q: Find the error: Neither [A] the teacher [B] nor [C] the student [D] are here.
e: 周可可：就近原則！student 是單數，動詞要用 is 喔！❌

q: Find the error: He [A] said [B] that [C] he [D] will come yesterday.
e: 周可可：主句是過去式 said，從句也要用過去式 would 喔！✅

q: If I ________ rich, I would travel around the [[globe|全球]].
e: 周可可：與現在事實相反的虛擬語氣，be 動詞一律用 were。✅

q: The more you [[exercise|運動]], ________ you will feel.
e: 周可可：The more... the more... 越...就越...。❓

article:
Article: "The Urban Jungle" by Will Floyd
Will Floyd argues that city life, despite its [[convenience|便利]], often leads to social [[isolation|孤立]]. His study reveals that people in highly [[populated|人口稠密的]] areas spend less time in meaningful [[conversations|對話]] than those in rural areas. Floyd suggests that [[architects|建築師]] should design more public spaces to foster community [[engagement|參與]].
q: What is the main concern in Will Floyd's article?
e: 周可可：文中提到城市生活常導致 social isolation (社交孤立) 喔！✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Urban Jungle) According to the text, how can architects help?
q: Architects should help by ________.
e: 周可可：結尾說要設計更多公用空間 (public spaces) 來促進參與。✅

q: His [[eloquent|口才流利的]] speech [[persuaded|說服]] the entire committee.
e: 周可可：eloquent 就是口才好、流利的意思。✅

q: ________ his [[injury|受傷]], he finished the [[marathon|馬拉松]].
e: 周可可：Despite 是介系詞，後面接名詞 injury 喔！✅

q: The [[meticulous|精細的]] researcher avoided any [[negligence|疏忽]].
e: 周可可：meticulous 是非常仔細的意思。✅

q: Find the error: It [A] is [B] no use [C] to cry [D] now.
e: 周可可：It is no use 後面接 V-ing (crying)！❌

q: The [[fragrance|香氣]] of the [[lilies|百合花]] filled the garden.
e: 周可可：fragrance 是香氣，等於 scent。✅

q: Hardly ________ the bell rang when the students ran out.
e: 周可可：Hardly 搭配過去完成式 (had) 的倒裝。✅

article:
Article: "The Silent Giant" by Will Floyd
Will Floyd's investigation into the [[Amazon|亞馬遜]] rainforest shows that it produces 20% of the world's [[oxygen|氧氣]]. However, [[deforestation|森林砍伐]] is [[accelerating|加速]] at an [[alarming|驚人的]] rate. Floyd warns that losing this [[ecosystem|生態系統]] would be [[catastrophic|災難性的]] for global climate regulation.
q: What percentage of the world's oxygen does the Amazon produce?
e: 周可可：文中明確提到是 20% 喔！✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Silent Giant) What does the word 'catastrophic' mean?
q: The loss would be catastrophic. This means ________.
e: 周可可：catastrophic 就是災難性的 (disastrous)。❌

q: He was [[procrastinating|拖延]] so much that he missed the [[deadline|截止日]].
e: 周可可：procrastinating 就是愛拖延啦！✅

q: Find the error: She [A] prefers [B] coffee [C] than [D] tea.
e: 周可可：prefer A to B，所以 than 應該改為 to 喔！❌

q: The [[abrupt|突然的]] ending of the movie left the audience [[confused|困惑的]].
e: 周可可：abrupt 就是突如其來、突然的意思。✅

q: Not until yesterday ________ I realized I had left my keys at home.
e: 周可可：Not until 放在句首，主句要倒裝 did I realize。✅

q: The [[ancient|古老的]] manuscript was so [[fragile|脆弱的]] that it required careful handling.
e: 周可可：fragile 是指易碎、脆弱的，所以是 Delicate 喔！✅

q: She was [[overwhelmed|招架不住]] by the [[complexity|複雜性]] of the task.
e: 周可可：overwhelmed 在這裡指被繁重的任務壓得喘不過氣。❓

q: Find the error: Neither [A] the teacher [B] nor [C] the student [D] are here.
e: 周可可：就近原則！student 是單數，動詞要用 is 喔！❌

q: Find the error: He [A] said [B] that [C] he [D] will come yesterday.
e: 周可可：主句是過去式 said，從句也要用過去式 would 喔！✅

q: If I ________ rich, I would travel around the [[globe|全球]].
e: 周可可：與現在事實相反的虛擬語氣，be 動詞一律用 were。✅

q: The more you [[exercise|運動]], ________ you will feel.
e: 周可可：The more... the more... 越...就越...。❓

article:
Article: "The Urban Jungle" by Will Floyd
Will Floyd argues that city life, despite its [[convenience|便利]], often leads to social [[isolation|孤立]]. His study reveals that people in highly [[populated|人口稠密的]] areas spend less time in meaningful [[conversations|對話]] than those in rural areas. Floyd suggests that [[architects|建築師]] should design more public spaces to foster community [[engagement|參與]].
q: What is the main concern in Will Floyd's article?
e: 周可可：文中提到城市生活常導致 social isolation (社交孤立) 喔！✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Urban Jungle) According to the text, how can architects help?
q: Architects should help by ________.
e: 周可可：結尾說要設計更多公用空間 (public spaces) 來促進參與。✅

q: His [[eloquent|口才流利的]] speech [[persuaded|說服]] the entire committee.
e: 周可可：eloquent 就是口才好、流利的意思。✅

q: ________ his [[injury|受傷]], he finished the [[marathon|馬拉松]].
e: 周可可：Despite 是介系詞，後面接名詞 injury 喔！✅

q: The [[meticulous|精細的]] researcher avoided any [[negligence|疏忽]].
e: 周可可：meticulous 是非常仔細的意思。✅

q: Find the error: It [A] is [B] no use [C] to cry [D] now.
e: 周可可：It is no use 後面接 V-ing (crying)！❌

q: The [[fragrance|香氣]] of the [[lilies|百合花]] filled the garden.
e: 周可可：fragrance 是香氣，等於 scent。✅

q: Hardly ________ the bell rang when the students ran out.
e: 周可可：Hardly 搭配過去完成式 (had) 的倒裝。✅

article:
Article: "The Silent Giant" by Will Floyd
Will Floyd's investigation into the [[Amazon|亞馬遜]] rainforest shows that it produces 20% of the world's [[oxygen|氧氣]]. However, [[deforestation|森林砍伐]] is [[accelerating|加速]] at an [[alarming|驚人的]] rate. Floyd warns that losing this [[ecosystem|生態系統]] would be [[catastrophic|災難性的]] for global climate regulation.
q: What percentage of the world's oxygen does the Amazon produce?
e: 周可可：文中明確提到是 20% 喔！✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Silent Giant) What does the word 'catastrophic' mean?
q: The loss would be catastrophic. This means ________.
e: 周可可：catastrophic 就是災難性的 (disastrous)。❌

q: He was [[procrastinating|拖延]] so much that he missed the [[deadline|截止日]].
e: 周可可：procrastinating 就是愛拖延啦！✅

q: Find the error: She [A] prefers [B] coffee [C] than [D] tea.
e: 周可可：prefer A to B，所以 than 應該改為 to 喔！❌

q: The [[abrupt|突然的]] ending of the movie left the audience [[confused|困惑的]].
e: 周可可：abrupt 就是突如其來、突然的意思。✅

q: Not until yesterday ________ I realized I had left my keys at home.
e: 周可可：Not until 放在句首，主句要倒裝 did I realize。✅

q: The professor's [[lecture|講座]] was so [[profound|深奧的]] that it left the students in deep [[thought|思考]].
e: 周可可：profound 指的是思想深奧、深刻喔！✅

q: Despite the [[setback|挫折]], the team remained [[steadfast|堅定不移的]] in their goal.
e: 周可可：steadfast 意為堅定的，等於 Firm。✅

q: Find the error: Neither [A] the teacher [B] nor [C] the students [D] is coming.
e: 周可可：就近原則！students 是複數，動詞用 are！❌

q: ________ for his [[timely|及時的]] intervention, the project would have failed.
e: 周可可：對過去虛擬的倒裝句型！✅

article:
Article: "The Fragile Balance" by Will Floyd
The [[interconnectivity|互聯性]] of global markets, once hailed as a triumph of [[modernity|現代性]], has shown signs of significant [[vulnerability|脆弱性]]. Will Floyd argues that our reliance on single-source [[suppliers|供應商]] creates a house of cards. When one node fails, the entire system [[collapses|塌陷]]. Floyd's recent data suggests that localized [[production|生產]] might be the only way to ensure long-term [[resilience|韌性]].
q: According to Will Floyd, what is the main risk of global markets?
e: 周可可：文中提到對單一供應商的依賴 (single-source suppliers) 像紙牌屋一樣危險。✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Fragile Balance) The author suggests that the solution lies in ________.
e: 周可可：結尾提到 localized production (在地生產) 能確保韌性喔。✅

q: The [[meticulous|精細的]] design of the building [[reflects|反映]] the architect's [[expertise|專業]].
e: 周可可：meticulous 指極其仔細、精確。✅

q: Find the error: The [A] news [B] that [C] he is [D] are exciting.
e: 周可可：News 是不可數名詞，動詞用單數 is！❌

q: The more you [[read|閱讀]], ________ you will understand the [[nuances|細微差別]] of language.
e: 周可可：The more... the more... 經典結構。✅

q: Her [[unwavering|堅定不移的]] support for the [[charity|慈善]] is truly [[commendable|值得讚揚的]].
e: 周可可：unwavering 就是不搖晃、堅定的支持。✅

q: The [[abrupt|突然的]] closure of the factory led to widespread [[unemployment|失業]].
e: 周可可：abrupt 是指突如其來的。✅

q: Find the error: One [A] of the [B] student [C] has [D] won.
e: 周可可：One of 後面要接複數名詞 students 喔！❌

q: I'd rather you ________ [[noisy|吵鬧的]] during the [[performance|表演]].
e: 周可可：would rather 對現在的虛擬用過去式。✅

article:
Article: "The Echoes of Silence" by Will Floyd
In an age of constant [[stimulation|刺激]], silence has become a rare [[commodity|商品]]. Will Floyd's research into [[neurology|神經科學]] shows that the brain requires periods of absolute [[stillness|寂靜]] to process complex [[emotions|情感]]. Without it, our ability to think [[critically|批判性地]] is severely [[impaired|受損的]]. Floyd claims that modern society has [[undervalued|低估]] the power of doing nothing.
q: According to Floyd, why is silence important for the brain?
e: 周可可：文中提到腦部需要寂靜來處理複雜情感。✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Echoes of Silence) The author implies that modern society ________.
e: 周可可：最後一句說社會低估了(undervalued)無所事事的力量。✅

q: His [[ambiguous|含糊不清的]] answer left everyone [[confused|困惑的]].
e: 周可可：ambiguous 是指模稜兩可、不明確。✅

q: Find the error: If I [A] am [B] you, I [C] would [D] go.
e: 周可可：虛擬語氣 be 動詞一律用 were！❌

q: Hardly ________ the station when the train [[departed|出發]].
e: 周可可：Hardly 句首倒裝。✅

q: The [[fragrance|香氣]] of the [[blossoms|花朵]] was [[exquisite|優美的]].
e: 周可可：fragrance 就是氣味、香氣。✅

q: Find the error: It [A] is [B] high [C] time [D] we go.
e: 周可可：It is high time 後接從句動詞用過去式 went！❌

q: The scientist's [[hypothesis|假說]] was met with [[skepticism|懷疑]] until further [[evidence|證據]] emerged.
e: 周可可：skepticism 就是懷疑，與 Doubt 同義。✅

q: The [[pervasive|普遍的]] influence of social media is [[reshaping|重塑]] modern [[communication|溝通]].
e: 周可可：pervasive 意指無處不在、遍布的，等於 Widespread。✅

q: Find the error: He [A] is [B] looking forward [C] to [D] travel to Paris.
e: 周可可：look forward to 這裡的 to 是介系詞，應接 traveling 喔！❌

q: Not only ________ the piano beautifully, but she also composes her own music.
e: 周可可：Not only 放在句首，第一個分句要倒裝：does she play。✅

article:
Article: "The Architecture of Memory" by Will Floyd
Will Floyd's latest [[monograph|專著]] explores how physical spaces [[influence|影響]] cognitive [[recall|回想]]. He argues that our environments are not just backdrops but active [[participants|參與者]] in the encoding of memories. A high-ceilinged room, for instance, might [[encourage|鼓勵]] abstract thinking, while narrow corridors could [[foster|促進]] detail-oriented focus. Floyd warns that the increasing [[homogenization|同質化]] of modern office spaces may lead to a [[decline|下降]] in collective [[creativity|創造力]].
q: What does Will Floyd suggest about physical spaces?
o: They actively participate in memory encoding
They have no effect on creativity
e: 周可可：文中提到環境是 active participants (主動參與者) 喔！✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Architecture of Memory) What is the potential risk of modern office design mentioned?
e: 周可可：結尾說 homogenization (同質化) 可能導致創意下降。✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Architecture of Memory) The word 'foster' in the text is closest in meaning to ________.
e: 周可可：foster 有促進、培養的意思，等於 Promote。❌

q: His [[eloquent|口才流利的]] speech [[persuaded|說服]] the board to [[approve|批准]] the budget.
e: 周可可：eloquent 就是說話流利且有說服力。✅

q: Find the error: [A] Despite [B] he was [C] tired, he [D] finished the work.
e: 周可可：Despite 是介系詞，後面不能直接接子句，應改為 Although 或是 In spite of the fact that。❌

q: It is essential that the [[application|申請]] ________ submitted before [[midnight|午夜]].
e: 周可可：essential 引導的從句，動詞要用原型 be 喔！✅

q: The [[meticulous|精細的]] cleanup of the [[oil spill|油污]] took several months.
e: 周可可：meticulous 指極其仔細徹底，這裡等於 Thorough。✅

q: Find the error: Each [A] of the [B] members [C] have [D] a vote.
e: 周可可：Each 作為主語時，動詞要用單數 has 喔！❌

q: So ________ was the [[scenery|風景]] that I forgot to take any photos.
e: 周可可：So + 形容詞放在句首要倒裝。✅

q: The team's [[victory|勝利]] was [[inevitable|必然的]] given their [[superior|卓越的]] training.
e: 周可可：inevitable 就是不可避免、必然發生的。✅

q: Find the error: I [A] would [B] rather [C] you [D] go now.
e: 周可可：would rather + 從句表示願望，動詞用過去式 went 喔！❌

q: ________ seen from the moon, the Earth looks like a blue marble.
e: 周可可：這題考分詞結構的省略，When (it is) seen...。✅

q: The [[fragrance|香氣]] of the coffee [[evoked|喚起]] memories of his childhood.
e: 周可可：evoke 有喚起、召喚的意思，等於 Summoned。✅

q: Find the error: The [A] number [B] of cars [C] are [D] increasing daily.
e: 周可可：'The number of...' 做主語動詞用單數 is！如果是 'A number of' 才用複數。❌

q: Hardly ________ the game started when it began to [[hail|下冰雹]].
e: 周可可：Hardly... when... 固定配 had 倒裝。✅

article:
Article: "The Ethics of AI" by Will Floyd
As AI systems become more [[autonomous|自主的]], the question of [[accountability|問責]] becomes [[paramount|首要的]]. Will Floyd points out that an [[algorithm|演算法]] cannot feel [[remorse|悔恨]], yet its decisions can have life-altering [[consequences|後果]]. Floyd proposes a 'human-in-the-loop' model, where ethical [[oversight|監督]] remains a strictly human [[domain|領域]]. He argues that we must not delegate our [[moral|道德的]] compass to code.
q: What does 'paramount' mean in this context?
e: 周可可：paramount 意思是首要的、最重要的。✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Ethics of AI) What model does Floyd propose?
e: 周可可：文中提到 human-in-the-loop model (人類參與環節)。✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Ethics of AI) According to Floyd, remorse is something ________.
e: 周可可：文中說演算法不能感覺 remorse (悔恨)。❌

q: The [[diligent|勤奮的]] student always [[surpasses|超過]] her peers in exams.
e: 周可可：diligent 就是勤勉刻苦。✅

q: Find the error: He [A] is one of the [B] boys who [C] is [D] always late.
e: 周可可：who 指代複數 boys，所以動詞要用 are 喔！❌

q: Scarcely ________ finished his speech when the audience [[applauded|鼓掌]].
e: 周可可：Scarcely 放在句首也需要倒裝喔。✅

q: The [[abrupt|突然的]] change in the [[itinerary|行程]] caught us by [[surprise|驚訝]].
e: 周可可：abrupt 意思是突如其來的。✅

q: Find the error: She [A] is [B] the most [C] unique [D] person I know.
e: 周可可：unique 本身就是最高級了，不加 most！❌

q: The more you [[practice|練習]], ________ you will become.
e: 周可可：The more... the more... 越練習越精通 (proficient)。✅

q: His [[obsolete|過時的]] methods are no longer [[effective|有效的]] in today's market.
e: 周可可：obsolete 指過時、淘汰的，即 Outdated。✅

q: Find the error: I [A] wish [B] I [C] was [D] a bird.
e: 周可可：wish 引導的虛擬語氣 be 動詞要用 were 喔！❌

q: The [[prolific|多產的]] author published three best-selling [[novels|小說]] last year.
e: 周可可：prolific 是指產量豐富、多產的，等於 Productive。✅

q: The [[negotiations|談判]] reached a [[deadlock|僵局]] after both sides refused to [[compromise|妥協]].
e: 周可可：deadlock 指的是無法前進的僵局，即 Stalemate。✅

q: Find the error: She [A] is [B] much [C] more [D] taller than her brother.
e: 周可可：taller 本身就是比較級，前面不加 more！much 是可以修飾比較級的喔。❌

q: Find the error: Not [A] until [B] he arrived [C] did [D] he remembered the keys.
e: 周可可：助動詞 did 後面要接原形動詞 remember 喔！❌

q: ________ for the heavy traffic, I would have arrived at the [[airport|機場]] on time.
e: 周可可：虛擬語氣對過去假設的倒裝：Had it not been for... ✅

article:
Article: "The Psychological City" by Will Floyd
Will Floyd's latest [[urban|城市的]] study argues that the physical [[layout|佈局]] of a city directly [[impacts|影響]] the mental [[well-being|健康]] of its residents. In neighborhoods with wide, tree-lined streets, Floyd observed a 15% [[reduction|減少]] in stress-related [[disorders|疾病]]. Conversely, high-density areas with minimal greenery lead to a sense of [[alienation|疏離感]]. Floyd suggests that 'urban [[acupuncture|針灸]]'—small, strategic green interventions—can [[rejuvenate|使恢復活力]] aging city centers.
q: What is the main finding of Will Floyd's urban study?
e: 周可可：第一句就說佈局會影響居民的心理健康喔！✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Psychological City) What is 'urban acupuncture' as described in the text?
e: 周可可：文中提到它是指戰略性的小型綠化干預。✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Psychological City) The word 'alienation' in the text refers to a feeling of ________.
e: 周可可：alienation 是指疏離感，也就是被孤立 (isolated) 的感覺。❌

q: The [[resilient|有韌性的]] local economy quickly [[recovered|恢復]] after the financial [[crisis|危機]].
e: 周可可：resilient 指能快速恢復、有韌性的，這裡等於 Strong。✅

q: Find the error: Every [A] teacher [B] and [C] student [D] were present.
e: 周可可：Every 修飾的主語，動詞要用單數 was 喔！❌

q: The more you [[concentrate|專注]], ________ you will finish the task.
e: 周可可：The more... the more... 越專注就越快。✅

q: The [[redundant|多餘的]] information in the report made it [[tedious|乏味的]] to read.
e: 周可可：redundant 意思是多餘、不必要的。✅

q: Find the error: He [A] told [B] me [C] that [D] he will leave soon.
e: 周可可：時態一致！前面是 told (過去式)，後面要用 would 喔！❌

q: I suggest that the [[meeting|會議]] ________ postponed until next week.
e: 周可可：suggest 的從句動詞用原型 be。✅

q: The [[meticulous|精細的]] researcher [[documented|記錄]] every tiny detail.
e: 周可可：meticulous 就是指非常精確、仔細，等於 Precise。✅

q: Find the error: It [A] is [B] no [C] worth [D] crying over.
e: 周可可：固定搭配是 It is NOT worth... 或是 It is no USE... 喔！❌

q: The [[fragrance|香氣]] of the roses is quite [[intoxicating|令人陶醉的]].
e: 周可可：intoxicating 在這指迷人的、引人入勝的，即 Alluring。✅

q: Hardly ________ had I started to [[speak|說話]] when he interrupted me.
e: 周可可：Hardly 已經在句首倒裝了，後接 had I started，所以橫線處不需額外助動詞。✅

q: Find the error: One [A] of my [B] brothers [C] are [D] a doctor.
e: 周可可：主語是 One，所以動詞要用單數 is！❌

q: His [[integrity|正直]] was never in [[doubt|懷疑]]; everyone trusted him.
e: 周可可：integrity 就是正直、誠實的意思。✅

q: ________ his [[wealth|財富]], he lives a very simple life.
e: 周可可：Despite + 名詞，表示儘管。✅

q: Find the error: I [A] am [B] used [C] to [D] get up early.
e: 周可可：be used to 這裡的 to 是介系詞，後面要接 V-ing (getting)！❌

q: The [[abrupt|突然的]] change in plans caused much [[confusion|混亂]].
e: 周可可：abrupt 就是突然、唐突的。✅

article:
Article: "The Lost Script" by Will Floyd
The [[deciphering|解密]] of the ancient 'Xylos' script was a task that [[baffled|使困惑]] linguists for generations. Will Floyd, using a new [[algorithmic|演算法的]] approach, discovered that the script was not phonetic but [[logographic|表意文字的]]. This [[revelation|啟示]] has changed how we view the [[migration|遷移]] patterns of the early islanders. Floyd's work emphasizes the importance of [[computational|計算的]] linguistics in modern [[archaeology|考古學]].
q: What was unique about Will Floyd's approach to the script?
e: 周可可：文中說他用了全新的演算法 (algorithmic) 方法喔！✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Lost Script) According to the text, the Xylos script is ________.
e: 周可可：Floyd 發現該文字是表意的 (logographic) 而非表音的。❌

q: The scientist provided [[conclusive|決定性的]] evidence that [[verified|驗證]] the new theory.
e: 周可可：conclusive 是指決定性、確鑿的，等於 Decisive。✅

q: Her [[unconventional|非傳統的]] teaching methods [[sparked|引發]] a lot of interest.
e: 周可可：unconventional 是指不落俗套、有創意的，這裡接近 Original。✅

q: Find the error: Neither [A] the doctor [B] nor [C] the nurses [D] is available.
e: 周可可：就近原則！靠近動詞的是複數 nurses，所以動詞要用 are 喔！❌

q: Find the error: He [A] is [B] so [C] a [D] kind man that everyone likes him.
e: 周可可：語序錯誤！應該是 such a kind man 或是 so kind a man。❌

q: Scarcely ________ begun his speech when the [[lights|燈光]] went out.
e: 周可可：Scarcely 放在句首要倒裝，且搭配過去完成式！✅

article:
Article: "The Digital Aura" by Will Floyd
Will Floyd's latest [[essay|文章]] explores the concept of [[authenticity|真實性]] in the age of [[reproduction|複製]]. He argues that while technology can replicate an artwork's physical [[attributes|屬性]], it cannot capture its 'aura'—the unique [[historical|歷史的]] context of its creation. Floyd warns that over-reliance on digital [[archives|檔案]] might lead to a [[superficial|膚淺的]] understanding of art history. He suggests that the [[tangible|有形的]] experience of art is still [[irreplaceable|不可替代的]].
q: What does Will Floyd believe technology cannot replicate?
e: 周可可：文中提到科技可以複製物理屬性，但不能複製『aura』(靈氣/氛圍) 喔！✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Digital Aura) Floyd suggests that our experience of art should be ________.
e: 周可可：結尾提到有形 (tangible) 的經驗是不可替代的。✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Digital Aura) According to the text, what is the risk of digital archives?
e: 周可可：文中提到這可能導致對藝術史膚淺 (superficial) 的理解。❌

q: The manager [[implemented|實施]] a new [[policy|政策]] to improve efficiency.
e: 周可可：implement 是指實施、執行，等於 Applied。✅

q: Find the error: The [A] news [B] about [C] the [D] accidents are true.
e: 周可可：News 是不可數名詞，動詞要用單數 is！❌

q: The more you [[contribute|貢獻]], ________ you will feel about yourself.
e: 周可可：The more... the more... 經典比較級。✅

q: The [[obsolete|過時的]] machinery was replaced with [[state-of-the-art|最先進的]] equipment.
e: 周可可：obsolete 就是過時、被淘汰的意思。✅

q: Find the error: I [A] look [B] forward [C] to [D] meet you soon.
e: 周可可：look forward to + V-ing，所以要接 meeting 喔！❌

q: It is essential that he ________ the [[contract|合約]] before signing.
e: 周可可：essential 引導從句，動詞用原型 read。✅

q: The [[meticulous|精細的]] scientist checked the [[data|數據]] three times.
e: 周可可：meticulous 是指非常仔細，等於 Thorough。✅

q: Find the error: She [A] is [B] enough [C] smart [D] to solve it.
e: 周可可：語序不對！應該是 smart enough 喔。❌

q: The [[fragrance|香氣]] of the lavender was [[soothing|令人放鬆的]].
e: 周可可：fragrance 是香氣，等於 scent。✅

q: Only in this way ________ reach a [[consensus|共識]].
e: 周可可：Only + 片語放在句首，要部分倒裝喔！✅

q: Find the error: Each [A] of the [B] student [C] has [D] a book.
e: 周可可：Each of 後面要接複數名詞 students 喔！❌

q: His [[integrity|正直]] is [[admirable|值得欽佩的]]; he never lies.
e: 周可可：integrity 就是正直、誠實。✅

q: ________ his [[poverty|貧窮]], he donated a lot to [[charity|慈善]].
e: 周可可：Despite 是介系詞，後接名詞。✅

q: Find the error: He [A] is [B] used [C] to [D] sleep late.
e: 周可可：be used to 這裡的 to 是介系詞，應接 sleeping！❌

q: The [[abrupt|突然的]] ending of the movie was [[disappointing|令人失望的]].
e: 周可可：abrupt 就是突然的意思。✅

article:
Article: "The Urban Pulse" by Will Floyd
Will Floyd argues that the 'pulse' of a city is found in its [[informal|非正式的]] economies. From street vendors to pop-up markets, these [[activities|活動]] provide a [[resilience|韌性]] that formal structures lack. Floyd's study suggests that over-regulation can [[stifle|扼殺]] this organic growth. He calls for a more [[flexible|靈活的]] approach to urban management that [[accommodates|容納]] these diverse actors.
q: Where does Will Floyd find the 'pulse' of a city?
e: 周可可：第一句就提到是在非正式經濟 (informal economies) 中喔！✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Urban Pulse) What is a potential danger of over-regulation according to Floyd?
e: 周可可：文中說過度監管會 stifle (扼殺) 有機增長。❌

q: The [[prevalent|流行的]] belief that technology solves all problems is being [[challenged|挑戰]].
e: 周可可：prevalent 意指普遍、流行的，等於 Common。✅

q: His [[versatility|多才多藝]] as an actor allowed him to play both [[villains|反派]] and heroes.
e: 周可可：versatility 指多才多藝、多功能性，接近 Adaptability。✅

q: Find the error: She [A] has [B] finished [C] the [D] work yesterday.
e: 周可可：看到 yesterday 這種具體過去時間，要用簡單過去式 finished，不可以用現在完成式喔！❌

q: Find the error: [A] Despite [B] the [C] fact that [D] he was ill, but he came.
e: 周可可：Despite (或是 Although) 跟 but 不可以同時出現！要把 but 去掉。❌

q: It was ________ he reached the age of 30 ________ he started to learn English.
e: 周可可：經典強調句型：It was not until... that... ✅

q: Were I in your ________, I would accept the offer immediately.
e: 周可可：'In one's shoes' 是一個成語，意思是處於某人的境地。✅

q: The [[turbulent|動盪的]] history of the region has led to many [[social|社交的]] changes.
e: 周可可：turbulent 指動盪、不穩定的，等於 Unsettled。✅

q: Find the error: [A] A number of [B] student [C] are [D] waiting outside.
e: 周可可：A number of 後面要接複數名詞 students 喔！❌

article:
Article: "The Final Frontier of Design" by Will Floyd
Will Floyd concludes that the ultimate goal of design is not [[ornamentation|裝飾]] but [[functionality|功能性]]. He asserts that a well-designed object should be [[intuitive|直覺的]], requiring no manual. Floyd's [[philosophy|哲學]] is simple: if a design needs an [[explanation|解釋]], it has already failed its primary [[purpose|目的]].
q: What is Floyd's main philosophy on design?
o: A good design should be intuitive
Manuals are essential for good design
e: 周可可：文中說設計應該是直覺的 (intuitive)，不需要說明書！✅

article: (Refer to Floyd's Final Frontier) According to Floyd, when does a design fail?
o: When it is made of plastic
e: 周可可：最後一句說如果需要解釋，設計就已經失敗了。❌
